_meta.note: Integration(growth) & Disintegration(stress) directions. Stress sequence 1-4-2-8-5-7-1 and 9-6-3-9; growth is the exact reverse. Per-type mapping verified individually against The Enneagram Institute (the classic error site) — none reversed.
_meta.verified: adversarially fact-checked by a second agent against primary sources (deepinme research workflow, 2026-07)
_meta.attribution: Integration/disintegration line structure — classical Enneagram tradition; per-type mapping verified vs The Enneagram Institute.
_meta.source: see reference/sources.md and _meta of related item files

arrows.description: Each type is connected by inner lines to two other types. One line is the Direction of Integration (Growth); the other is the Direction of Disintegration (Stress). The lines follow two sequences: a hexad and the inner triangle.
arrows.note_on_direction: Under stress a type takes on the average-to-unhealthy traits of its stress point; in growth it takes on the healthy traits of its growth point. The growth direction is the exact reverse of the stress direction. Reversing these is a common error; every value below was verified individually against The Enneagram Institute's type-specific pages.
